title: TCW Launcher Windows Beta
summary: Launcher profile panel hotfix and public website refresh.
notes: Restores the launcher trooper profile panel so players can see their Steam-linked name, rank, unit, progression, and profile actions.
Keeps website profile, community, store, server, audio, theme, and Steam-linked backend systems online.
Keeps TeamSpeak/TFAR helper checks and the updater install handoff in the public package.
